requirement: current issue text or current transcript must be available
claim_boundary: No Ayumi reply can be drafted from stale or unread issue state.
next_gate: User supplies current issue text or approves live issue refresh.

requirement: digest must use current supplied text
claim_boundary: No transcript digest is current unless the user confirms the pasted snapshot or supplies current issue evidence.
next_gate: Create digest only after current text is supplied.

requirement: draft must cite current text and banked evidence
claim_boundary: No Ayumi-facing draft is banked without current issue text and evidence-specific wording.
next_gate: Draft after current text and user asks for reply text.

requirement: exact reply text must exist before scanning
claim_boundary: No forbidden-claim scan can run because there is no approved exact reply text to scan.
next_gate: Scan exact draft for bridge REML coverage optimizer and AI-REML overclaims.

requirement: user must approve exact final sender text
claim_boundary: No public comment is allowed without exact approval.
next_gate: Request exact approval after final draft exists.

requirement: public GitHub issue comment requires approval
public completion evidence requires posted URL
claim_boundary: No posted URL exists because no public comment was made.
next_gate: Record URL only after public comment exists.

requirement: user must explicitly request staging and commit
claim_boundary: No staging or commit was performed.
next_gate: Stage and commit only after explicit user request.

requirement: checkpoint must capture current dirty state
claim_boundary: The checkpoint is a handoff aid only; it is not commit or public-support evidence.
next_gate: Refresh checkpoint after any further edits.

requirement: next start point must name remaining blockers
claim_boundary: Next start is SR191-SR198 closeout gates after current issue text and explicit approval.
next_gate: Resume Ayumi arc only with current issue evidence and approved final text.
